utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 7 items: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes: destination (present); travel_dates (present with start/end); transportation (present but not flight details—only 'Mixed (Public Transport + Hiking)' and an estimated cost, so missing required flight details); accommodation (present but only as type and estimated cost—no specific hotel selection, so not fully specified); activities (present with types/locations but no costs per activity—missing costs, though a lump sum appears in total_budget, the activities item itself lacks costs); additional_services (present with costs for one item and a recommendation for another—acceptable as 'any extra services with costs' because at least some costs are provided); total_budget (present with breakdown). Therefore, fully specified according to requirements: destination (yes), travel_dates (yes), transportation (no—missing flight details), accommodation (no—missing specific hotel selection), activities (no—missing per-activity costs), additional_services (partially specified but includes costs—counts as included), total_budget (yes). That yields 4 included out of 7.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package mentions destination Slovenia (not in destination ratings list), transportation as mixed public transport + hiking (no exact match in transportation ratings), accommodation as mixed city and alpine lodgings (no specific accommodation name from the rated list), activities include Hiking, Photography, Wellness (Yoga Sessions). From the ground-truth activities list, we can map: Hiking to 'Hiking Expedition' (exact activity in ratings), Yoga Sessions to 'Yoga Retreat'. Photography and Wellness Center Visits are not directly listed as rated activities. Additional services include emergency_preparedness €60, medical_consultation recommended; the closest rated service is 'Virtual Personal Assistant' in additional_hotel_services/general_services, but those were not included in the package. Therefore, only two clear mappings are possible.
